channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 2/17: CBS Evening News
item.description: Blinding dust storm leads to deadly pileup on Colorado highway; The "crying horse" toy taking over China's internet.

item.title: Epstein survivor tells CBS News how she was trafficked, and assaulted
item.description: Juliette Bryant says not long after meeting Jeffrey Epstein, he assaulted her, and she realized, "this is not a modeling opportunity, I've been kidnap...

item.title: 6 rescued as efforts for missing continue following California avalanche: Authorities
item.description: Search crews responded to a report of an avalanche that occurred Tuesday in the Castle Peak area of California's Sierra Nevada, the Nevada County Sher...

item.title: WATCH: Man seen ripping toddler away from mother in Italian supermarket
item.description: Police arrested the man, and the girl suffered a broken leg amid the chaos.

item.title: Lindsey Vonn's Olympic crash rekindles concern over ski bindings design
item.description: Lindsey Vonn's devastating injury when her skis didn't come off has put a spotlight on bindings, which hold boots to skis and are some of the oldest t...

item.title: Rescuers push through winter storm to 6 survivors of a California avalanche. 9 others are missing
item.description: Crews have pushed through mountainous wilderness in California near Lake Tahoe during a snowstorm to rescue six backcountry skiers who survived an ava...

item.title: In a first, shark seen on camera in Antarctica waters, surprising researchers
item.description: A large shark was caught on camera for the first time in Antarctica's waters, surprising researchers. "There's a general rule of thumb that you don't ...

item.title: See the Olympics schedule for the 2026 Milano Cortina Games
item.description: This is what you need to know about when the 2026 Milano Cortina Winter Olympics start and end, along with key games and events on the schedule.

item.title: WATCH: Lavender marriages appeal to new generation
item.description: While lavender marriages were often a necessity for the LGBTQ community in the 1950s, some younger generations are curious about them and other modern...

item.title: WATCH: US surfer remembered by friends and family after apparent murder in Costa Rica
item.description: Friends and family are remembering U.S. surfer Kurt Van Dyke after he was found murdered in his home in Costa Rica, according to local authorities.

item.title: House Oversight Committee set to depose former Epstein associate Leslie Wexner
item.description: Members of the House Oversight Committee on Wednesday are set to depose retail billionaire Leslie Wexner, whose wealth helped fuel Jeffrey Epstein's f...

item.title: Shooter killed ex-wife and a son in Rhode Island ice rink attack, police say
Minnesotaâs Legislature braces for a federal immigration fight as the enforcement surge winds down
